name: Enchanted Lake
desc: Established family subdivision — more affordable than beachside Kailua, parks, local schools, quiet streets.
insider: The neighborhood loop streets are perfect for evening walks — very safe, well-lit, flat, and kid-friendly
Enchanted Lake Shopping Center has Zippy's, a solid sushi spot, and Teddy's Bigger Burgers — all the daily essentials covered
The lake itself is man-made and the area floods during heavy Kona storms — check FEMA flood zone maps before buying
10-minute bike ride to Kailua Beach via the path — way smarter than driving and fighting for parking in town
Kailua Elementary and Enchanted Lake Elementary are both strong public schools — big draw for families moving here
Boots & Kimo's in nearby Kailua town is famous for macadamia nut pancakes — the line is long but worth the walk from here
Homes were built in the 1960s so expect older plumbing and potential termite issues — always get thorough inspections
Kawainui Marsh is right next door — the paved walking path is great for joggers and birdwatchers at sunset
Home prices are noticeably lower than beachside Kailua but you still get the same schools and town access
Mosquitoes are fierce near the lake and marsh edges during wet months — citronella and good window screens are a must
